div.p: Real-time observability for coroutine runtime performance

g.text: io_wait_ns: u64 | Time blocked on I/O

text.tspan: // Calculate Gini coefficient for load balance
// Calculate Gini coefficient for load balance

// 1. Start from waiter, follow wait_for -> held_by
// 2. If we return to start, cycle detected
// Recovery: abort youngest coroutine in chain
